Characteristics for processes of polymerization
Control or adjustment of polymerization parameters
High pressure, i.e. P > 50 MPa, 500 bars or 7250 psi
Features related to the catalyst preparation, the catalyst use or to the deactivation of the catalyst
Additive used together with the catalyst, excluding compounds containing Al or B
Anti-static agent incorporated into the catalyst
Multinuclear procatalyst, i.e. containing two or more metals, being different or not
Dual catalyst, i.e. use of two different catalysts, where none of the catalysts is a metallocene
Transitioning, i.e. transition from one catalyst to another with use of a deactivating agent
Catalyst characterized by its size
Catalyst support treated by an anion, e.g. Cl-, F-, SO42-
Presence of a deactivator
Metallocene catalysts
Cp or analog bridged to a non-Cp X neutral donor
Cp or analog bridged to a non-Cp X anionic donor
Cp or analog not bridged to a non-Cp X ancillary neutral donor
Cp or analog not bridged to a non-Cp X ancillary anionic donor
Cp or analog where at least one of the carbon atoms of the coordinating ring is replaced by a heteroatom
Cp analog where at least one of the carbon atoms of the non-coordinating part of the condensed ring is replaced by a heteroatom
Heteroatom-substituted Cp, i.e. Cp or analog where at least one of the substituent of the Cp or analog ring is or contains a heteroatom
Heteroatom bridge, i.e. Cp or analog where the bridging atom linking the two Cps or analogs is a heteroatom different from Si
Cyclic bridge, i.e. Cp or analog where the bridging unit linking the two Cps or analogs is part of a cyclic group
Heteroatom-substituted bridge, i.e. Cp or analog where the bridge linking the two Cps or analogs is substituted by at least one group that contains a heteroatom
Non-aromatic cycle-substituted bridge, i.e. Cp or analog where the bridge linking the two Cps or analogs is substituted by a non-aromatic cycle
Long bridge, i.e. Cp or analog where the bridging unit linking the two Cps or analogs is composed of at least two atoms which are not part of a cycle and which are not an ethylene bridge
Living radical polymerisation
Atom Transfer Radical Polymerization [ATRP] or reverse ATRP
Stable Free Radical Polymerisation [SFRP]; Nitroxide Mediated Polymerisation [NMP] for, e.g. using 2,2,6,6-tetramethylpiperidine-1-oxyl [TEMPO]

Use of a di- or tri-thiocarbonylthio compound, e.g. di- or tri-thioester, di- or tri-thiocarbamate, or a xanthate as chain transfer agent, e.g . Reversible Addition Fragmentation chain Transfer [RAFT] or Macromolecular Design via Interchange of Xanthates [MADIX]

High molecular weight, e.g. >800,000 Da.
Low molecular weight, e.g. <100,000 Da.

Broad molecular weight distribution, i.e. Mw/Mn > 6

Monomodal/unimodal molecular weight distribution
Comonomer distribution, e.g. normal, reverse or narrow
High density, i.e. > 0.95 g/cm3
Low density, i.e. < 0.91 g/cm3

Short chain branches

Syndiotactic
